'''竏嘖-ch-h-l''' ('''kasachheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waite|waite]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waite|waite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘖-ch-h-l
|-
! Lemma
| kasachheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisacheloko|thisacheloko]] || [[word:jisacheloko|jisacheloko]] || [[word:shisacheloko|shisacheloko]] || [[word:kisacheloko|kisacheloko]]
|-

|-

|-
